# Conrad Cruz Real Estate Services

> A Salt Lake City, Utah real estate brokerage led by Matt Strong, an active real estate operator and principal broker. Conrad Cruz serves buyers, sellers, and investors across the Wasatch Front, with a particular focus on investment property transactions.

## About

- **Company:** Conrad Cruz Real Estate Services, LLC
- **Utah Brokerage License:** #10979414-CN00
- **Principal Broker:** Matt Strong (Utah License #5487863-PB00)
- **Office:** 6905 S. 1300 E. #331, Midvale, UT 84047
- **Phone:** 801-244-3888
- **Email:** mstrong@conradcruz.com
- **Founded:** 2015
- **Agents:** 12 licensed Utah agents

## Differentiation

Conrad Cruz is led by an active real estate operator, not a career sales agent. Matt Strong has personally executed 425+ fix-and-flip transactions, manages a 25-property rental portfolio across 24 LLCs, and operates Sierra West Funding — a private lending company that has funded over $380 million across 1,300+ real estate loans.

## Services

- Residential listing and selling representation
- Buyer representation (primary residence, second home, investment)
- Investment property representation (fix-and-flip, BRRRR, rental)
- Brokerage services for licensed Utah agents
- $3,500 flat-fee listing program for Sierra West Funding borrowers

## Service Area

Salt Lake City metropolitan area, Wasatch Front, Utah. Includes Salt Lake County, Utah County, Davis County, Summit County.

## Related Entities

- Sister company (private lending): Sierra West Funding — https://swcfund.com
- Principal broker YouTube: https://youtube.com/@MattStrong-RE
- Principal broker Instagram: https://instagram.com/m.b.strong

## Free Tools

- Fix-and-Flip Calculator: https://fixnflipcalculatorfrommattstrong.netlify.app
- BRRRR Calculator: https://brrrrcalculatorfrommattstrong.netlify.app
